title: Kali Uchis Concert
subtitle: Our most revisited memory of the year, something you really wanted, I hope you can remember this for life.

title: Tip Toe
subtitle: HYBS - The song that played on repeat during our first year together, and still holds a special place in our hearts.

title: Every Frame a Gift
subtitle: I know I don't take as many photos as you do, but every moment with you is worth capturing.

title: "I love you."
subtitle: Since we started dating, these three words have been the most meaningful and powerful expression of our feelings for each other. They encapsulate the depth of our connection and the love we share.
We had two trips during this year, there were little, I promise you when I have more time and money I will take you to one beautiful place.

We have one playlist for all the songs that we want to hear together, we lost our routine to ask each other for the song of the week, I'll retake it, please keep that in mind, and how to forget the playlist I made for you!

title: Thank You
subtitle:
For an incredible first year together.
Here's to many more.
